# Super Handlers — Complete Business Information

> Premier forklift sales, rentals, repair and maintenance serving Brampton, Toronto, and the Greater Toronto Area (GTA), Ontario, Canada.

## Company Overview

Super Handlers (also known as Super Handlers Lift) is a forklift equipment company headquartered in Brampton, Ontario, Canada. We are dedicated to providing comprehensive forklift services to businesses of all sizes across the Greater Toronto Area. Our team of certified technicians has extensive experience working with all major forklift brands and models.

## Contact Information

- **Business Name:** Super Handlers
- **Phone:** +1 647-573-0160
- **Email:** superhandlers1@gmail.com
- **Street Address:** 241 Advance Blvd
- **City:** Brampton
- **Province:** Ontario (ON)
- **Postal Code:** L6T 4J2
- **Country:** Canada
- **Website:** https://www.superhandlerslift.com
- **Contact Page:** https://www.superhandlerslift.com/contact

## Operating Hours

| Day | Hours |
|-----|-------|
| Monday | 8:00 AM – 6:00 PM |
| Tuesday | 8:00 AM – 6:00 PM |
| Wednesday | 8:00 AM – 6:00 PM |
| Thursday | 8:00 AM – 6:00 PM |
| Friday | 8:00 AM – 6:00 PM |
| Saturday | 9:00 AM – 2:00 PM |
| Sunday | Closed (24/7 emergency service available) |

Emergency breakdown service is available 24 hours a day, 7 days a week.

## Services

### Forklift Repair & Maintenance
We provide expert repair and maintenance for all forklift brands and models. Our certified technicians handle everything from routine servicing to complex engine and transmission repairs. We offer planned maintenance programs to minimize equipment downtime.

### Forklift Sales — New Units
We sell brand new forklifts from all major manufacturers. Our sales team helps businesses select the right equipment based on their specific warehouse, dock, or outdoor requirements.

### Forklift Sales — Pre-Owned / Used
Our certified pre-owned forklifts are thoroughly inspected, serviced, and come with a quality guarantee. This is a cost-effective option for businesses looking for reliable equipment at competitive prices.

### Forklift Rentals
We offer flexible rental programs — both short-term (daily, weekly) and long-term (monthly, annual). Ideal for seasonal peaks, temporary projects, or businesses testing equipment before purchasing.

### 24/7 Emergency Breakdown Service
Equipment breakdowns don't wait for business hours. Our emergency response team is available around the clock to get your operations back on track.

### Genuine OEM Parts
We stock and supply genuine OEM parts for all major forklift brands, ensuring the longevity and reliability of your equipment.

## Brands We Service and Sell

- Toyota
- Hyster
- Yale
- Crown
- Raymond
- Nissan
- And other major forklift manufacturers

## Service Area

We serve businesses across the Greater Toronto Area (GTA), including:

- **Brampton** (headquarters)
- **Toronto**
- **Mississauga**
- **Vaughan**
- **Etobicoke**
- **Markham**
- **Richmond Hill**
- **Oakville**
- **Burlington**
- And surrounding areas in the GTA

## Inventory

Browse our current inventory of new, pre-owned, and rental forklifts at:
https://www.superhandlerslift.com/shop

Inventory categories:
- New Forklifts
- Rental Forklifts
- Pre-Owned Forklifts

All pricing is in Canadian Dollars (CAD). For rental units, pricing is typically per month. Contact us for custom quotes.

## Why Choose Super Handlers

1. **All Major Brands** — We work with Toyota, Hyster, Yale, Crown, Raymond, Nissan, and more.
2. **Certified Technicians** — Our team is factory-trained and experienced.
3. **24/7 Emergency Service** — Breakdowns don't wait, and neither do we.
4. **Competitive Pricing** — Fair, transparent pricing on all services and equipment.
5. **Local Expertise** — Based in Brampton, we know the GTA market and respond quickly.
6. **Quality Guarantee** — Every pre-owned unit is inspected and certified before sale.

## Site Pages

- **Home:** https://www.superhandlerslift.com/
  Overview of Super Handlers, our value proposition, and quick access to services.

- **Shop / Inventory:** https://www.superhandlerslift.com/shop
  Browse and search our full forklift inventory. Filter by category (New, Rental, Pre-Owned). Each listing includes model name, description, pricing, and images.

- **About Us:** https://www.superhandlerslift.com/about
  Our company story, mission, and values. Learn about our team and commitment to quality.

- **Contact:** https://www.superhandlerslift.com/contact
  Contact form, phone number, email, office address, and service hours. Reach us for quotes, service requests, or general inquiries.
